verses.text: Waters issue from under the threshold of the house eastward, flowing past the altar. Life from God's house. From His presence streams a river of blessing.
Waters issue from under the threshold of the house eastward, flowing past the altar. Life from God's house. From His presence streams a river of blessing.

Measuring outward, the man leads him through waters rising from ankles to knees to loins, then 'waters to swim in,' a river none could pass. Ever-deepening grace. God's blessing grows from a trickle to an ocean.

Measuring outward, the man leads him through waters rising from ankles to knees to loins, then 'waters to swim in,' a river none could pass. Ever-deepening grace. God's blessing grows from a trickle to an ocean.

Measuring outward, the man leads him through waters rising from ankles to knees to loins, then 'waters to swim in,' a river none could pass. Ever-deepening grace. God's blessing grows from a trickle to an ocean.
He asks, 'Son of man, hast thou seen this?' On both banks were 'very many trees.' Fruitful banks. Where God's river flows, abundant life springs up.
He asks, 'Son of man, hast thou seen this?' On both banks were 'very many trees.' Fruitful banks. Where God's river flows, abundant life springs up.
The waters flow to the sea and heal it, so that 'every thing... whithersoever the rivers shall come, shall live.' Healing stream. The gospel river gives life wherever it reaches.
The waters flow to the sea and heal it, so that 'every thing... whithersoever the rivers shall come, shall live.' Healing stream. The gospel river gives life wherever it reaches.
Fishers shall line its banks, the fish exceeding many; but the marshes are left to salt. Life and exception. Those who refuse the healing waters remain barren.
Fishers shall line its banks, the fish exceeding many; but the marshes are left to salt. Life and exception. Those who refuse the healing waters remain barren.

By the river grow trees whose leaf never fades, bearing new fruit monthly, 'for meat,' the leaf 'for medicine.' Endless supply. The river of God yields food and healing without fail — a glimpse of paradise restored.
This is the border by which the land shall be divided among the twelve tribes; the north line is traced. Sure inheritance. God appoints to each his portion in the promised land.
This is the border by which the land shall be divided among the twelve tribes; the north line is traced. Sure inheritance. God appoints to each his portion in the promised land.
This is the border by which the land shall be divided among the twelve tribes; the north line is traced. Sure inheritance. God appoints to each his portion in the promised land.
The borders run by Hamath, Damascus, and the Jordan to the eastern sea. Defined bounds. God sets the limits of His people's home.
The borders run by Hamath, Damascus, and the Jordan to the eastern sea. Defined bounds. God sets the limits of His people's home.
The borders run by Hamath, Damascus, and the Jordan to the eastern sea. Defined bounds. God sets the limits of His people's home.
The south side reaches from Tamar to the river, and the west the great sea. Full compass. The whole land is measured out by God's hand.
The south side reaches from Tamar to the river, and the west the great sea. Full compass. The whole land is measured out by God's hand.

They shall divide the land, and 'the strangers that sojourn among you' shall share the inheritance with the tribes. Grace to the stranger. God's promise reaches beyond the natural-born to all who join His people.

They shall divide the land, and 'the strangers that sojourn among you' shall share the inheritance with the tribes. Grace to the stranger. God's promise reaches beyond the natural-born to all who join His people.
